title: Python Test Generator Result
description: Structured output from the QualityFlow Python test generator agent. Validated by the harness before the post-script runs.

test_files.description: Paths to generated Python test files (relative to repo root, with qf_ prefix)

target_directory.description: Source directory where test files were co-located, or null for fallback mode

output_mode.description: Whether tests were placed in the source tree or in outputs/

collection_verified.description: Whether the generated tests passed pytest collection

syntax_check_passed.description: Whether generated tests passed py_compile syntax check

conftest.description: Path to generated conftest.py, or null if existing conftest was reused

lsp_patterns.description: Path to extracted LSP patterns YAML
